query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayMl AS awayML, homeMl AS homeML, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelTotal, awayModelML, homeModelML, spreadEdge, totalEdge FROM games WHERE sport='NCAAM' AND gameDate='2026-03-26' AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC;
